TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pakala’ac, title = Pakala’ac, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pakala’ac} }

S.FORM: Pakala'ac O masadafdafay kakahad ko pala' no Pakala'ac adihay ko tayniay misalama' a lafang. Itiniay i Luye Cen no Taitung ko Pakala'ac a niyaro', 176 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 468 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 68% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 318 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 32% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 150 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 64%, Bunun 1%, roma 3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: pakaɾaʡaʦ o~u masaɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮafaj kakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u paɾaʡ no~u pakaɾaʡaʦ aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u tajniaj misaɾamaʡ a ɾafaŋ. itiniaj i ɾo~u~ujə ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u pakaɾaʡaʦ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Pakala'ac O masadafdafay kakahad ko pala' no Pakala'ac adihay ko tayniay misalama' a lafang. Itiniay i Luye Cen no Taitung ko Pakala'ac a niyaro', 176 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 468 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 68% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 318 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 32% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 150 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 64%, Bunun 1%, roma 3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: pakaɾaʡaʦ o~u masaɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮafaj kakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u paɾaʡ no~u pakaɾaʡaʦ aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u tajniaj misaɾamaʡ a ɾafaŋ. itiniaj i ɾo~u~ujə ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u pakaɾaʡaʦ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
